trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price holds above $0.57 support or 1h candle close above EMA50
trade_plans.invalidation: Price closes below $0.565 or funding velocity turns significantly negative
confluence_signals: Funding rate 13th percentile (bearish sentiment, potential for squeeze)
Funding Velocity accelerating positive (shorts paying more, squeeze building)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Multiple strong contrarian bullish signals (funding rate, funding velocity, OI capitulation) combined with volatility compression and price at EMA support suggest a high probability bounce/short squeeze.
